Volume confirmation is 6.3% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 3.6% versus SPY over 5 days and 1.2% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.90, confidence 0.87, and 1.0 weighted articles across 4 sources.

Evidence quality: 4 articles across 4 sources, 1.0 effective weighted articles, average relevance 1.00, average source quality 0.83, confidence 0.87.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Overall model score is 0.199 with high confidence.

news_evidence.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Names Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh as Co-Presidents
news_evidence.llm_reason: Company announcement of internal promotions to co-presidents is clearly company-specific governance news. It signals succession/management structure but does not indicate immediate changes to guidance, capital, or results; likely modest near-term market reaction only.

news_evidence.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. filed 8-K: 8-K
news_evidence.llm_reason: An SEC 8-K filing is potentially material. Without the filing contents, it's treated as company-specific and potentially significant (could relate to officer changes, governance, or other events). Impact estimate is moderate but confidence is limited due to lack of detail.
